word: H6380 - פֹּכֶרֶת צְבָיִים - Pôkereth Tsᵉbâyîym - po-keh'-reth tseb-awyeem' - Pochereth of Zebaim

sections.paragraph:
Original: פּכרת צביים

Transliteration: pôkereth tsebâyı̂ym

Phonetic: po-keh'-reth tseb-aw-yeem'

BDB Definition:

Pochereth of Zebaim = "here the cutting off"
  1. a servant of Solomon whose descendants returned from exile with Zerubbabel

Origin: from the act. part. (of the same form as the first word) fem. of an unused root (meaning to entrap) and pl. of H6643

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
